title: Engine API: viewer element, src loading, diagnostics UI
description: Implement the 04-engine-api surface after Stage 4: <archmap-viewer>, external src with src_fetch_failed, diagnostics target/panel, SVG pan/zoom controls, and viewer UI state without reparsing.
triage_notes: DONE (Claude): configurable console diagnostics added (spec 02 §23) — reportDiagnosticsToConsole + render console opt-in + viewer console attr (default on). Engine API surface (viewer element, src loading, src_fetch_failed, diagnostics panel, console) complete. Remaining controls/SVG interaction tracked in TASK-006; fit()/reset() still no-ops.
